title: Remote Graphic Designer Jobs on LinkedIn Canada (July 2025)
description: Comprehensive research on Remote Graphic Designer jobs in Canada found on LinkedIn.

mainEntity.name: How hard is it to find a remote graphic design job in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is highly competitive but very possible. While fully remote entry-level roles are scarce, intermediate to senior designers with strong digital, UX/UI, or motion graphics portfolios have excellent prospects on platforms like LinkedIn. Companies across Canada increasingly hire out-of-province talent for specialized design roles.

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary for a remote graphic designer in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Based on 2025 market data, remote graphic designers in Canada earn between $55,000 to $85,000 CAD annually. Specialized designers (such as product designers or motion graphics artists) at major tech companies can earn $90,000 to $120,000+ CAD.

mainEntity.name: Which Canadian companies hire the most remote graphic designers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tech companies like Shopify, Best Buy Canada, Coveo, Lightspeed Commerce, and large agencies such as Plus Company and Cossette are frequent hirers. E-commerce brands, gaming studios (like Liquid Development), and B2B SaaS companies also heavily recruit remote design talent.

mainEntity.name: Should I filter by 'Remote' or specific cities on LinkedIn?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should do both. Many 'Remote' jobs are listed under specific cities (e.g., 'Toronto, ON - Remote' or 'Montreal, QC - Hybrid/Remote'). Searching exclusively for the location 'Canada (Remote)' will miss companies that peg their remote roles to a head office location for payroll purposes.
